privileged_info_summary: The task is configured to use Jitsi Meet version stable-9753 with a Docker Compose setup. The metadata specifies three real Jitsi Meet configuration parameters: startWithAudioMuted and startWithVideoMuted are documented boolean settings for muting audio/video by default, and prejoinConfig is a real configuration object with an enabled property for controlling the pre-join screen. The config file path /home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/custom-config.js corresponds to the /config volume mounted in the web container. The result file path /home/ga/silent_join_result.txt is a task-specific verification file. All metadata values are factually correct regarding the configuration parameter names and file paths.
